channel.title: Head-Tags pulling in wrong title tag for posts page
channel.description:
Hello,
I'm using the **REST API - Head Tags** plugin, as well as the `frontity/head-tags` package, to add metadata to my site. I've noticed that, while my homepage and individual pages are showing the right title tags, my posts page is not. Instead, it's using the title of the last post of the pagination as its title.
The posts page: https://www.h-cubism.com/journal/ Notice the <title> is for the last post on the page, instead of the page's title which is "Journal"
The old WP page: https://wp.h-cubism.com/journal/ Notice the <title> correctly says "Journal"
Thanks in advance for any help!

item.title: Head-Tags pulling in wrong title tag for posts page
item.dc:creator: sandersbud4
item.description:
Please your help is needed here.

Read full topic
item.source: Head-Tags pulling in wrong title tag for posts page

item.title: Head-Tags pulling in wrong title tag for posts page
item.dc:creator: miscstuff.lyooe
item.description:
Hello,

I’m using the REST API - Head Tags plugin, as well as the frontity/head-tags package, to add metadata to my site. I’ve noticed that, while my homepage and individual pages are showing the right title tags, my posts page is not. Instead, it’s using the title of the last post of the pagination as its title.

The posts page: H-Cubism: (Broken) Site Design is Up
Notice the is for the last post on the page, instead of the page’s title which is “Journal”

The old WP page: H-Cubism: Journal
Notice the correctly says “Journal”

Thanks in advance for any help!

Read full topic
item.source: Head-Tags pulling in wrong title tag for posts page
